exercises.title: Placement of Time Words
exercises.description: Complete the sentences below based on the pictures provided using 去 + VP.

questions.question: 明天早上我們一起去 __________ 。
questions.explanation: Tomorrow morning we will go swimming together.

questions.question: 今天晚上我不想 __________ 。
questions.explanation: I don't want to go to the movies tonight.

questions.question: 你週末常 __________ 嗎？
questions.explanation: Do you often go play tennis on weekends?

questions.question: 我妹妹今天晚上要 __________ 。
questions.explanation: My younger sister wants to go play basketball tonight.

questions.question: 我爸爸去打棒球，我哥哥 __________ 。
questions.explanation: My dad goes to play baseball, my older brother goes to play soccer.

questions.question: 我常看美國電影。 -> __________，我常看。
questions.explanation: Bring the topic (American movies) to the front.

questions.question: 我覺得踢足球很好玩。 -> __________，我覺得很好玩。
questions.explanation: Bring the topic (playing soccer) to the front.

questions.question:
A: 你喜歡喝臺灣茶還是日本茶？
B: __________茶、__________茶，我都不喝。
questions.explanation: I drink neither Taiwanese tea nor Japanese tea.

questions.question:
A: 你喜歡越南菜還是臺灣菜？
B: __________和__________，我__________。
questions.answer: 越南菜 臺灣菜 都喜歡
questions.explanation: I like both Vietnamese food and Taiwanese food.

questions.question:
A: 你有弟弟和妹妹嗎？
B: __________和__________，我__________。
questions.answer: 弟弟 妹妹 都有
questions.explanation: I have both a younger brother and a younger sister.

questions.question:
A: 網球、籃球，你都喜歡嗎？
B: __________，我喜歡；__________，我__________。
questions.answer: 網球 籃球 不喜歡
questions.explanation: Tennis, I like; basketball, I don't like.

exercises.title: The Word Order of Adverbs 也, 都 and 常
exercises.description: Complete with 也, 都 or 常.

questions.question: 陳先生喜歡喝茶， ________ 喜歡喝咖啡。
questions.explanation: Mr. Chen likes drinking tea, and ALSO likes drinking coffee.

questions.question: 我 ________ 喝咖啡， ________ 常喝茶。
questions.explanation: I DON'T OFTEN drink coffee, and I ALSO often drink tea.

questions.question: 我不是日本人，他 ________ 不是日本人。
questions.explanation: I am not Japanese, and he is ALSO not Japanese.

questions.question: 我沒有哥哥， ________ 沒有姐姐。
questions.explanation: I don't have an older brother, and ALSO don't have an older sister.

questions.question: 他的家人都喜歡打網球，我家人也 ________ 喜歡打網球。
questions.explanation: All his family members like to play tennis, and my family members ALSO ALL like to play tennis.

questions.question: 我們 ________ 不常踢足球。
questions.explanation: We ALSO don't often play soccer.

questions.question: 我不 ________ 游泳。
questions.explanation: I don't OFTEN swim.

questions.question: 我們喝什麼茶？
questions.explanation: Let's drink Oolong tea!

questions.question: 我們吃什麼？
questions.explanation: Let's eat Taiwanese food!

questions.question: 我們看什麼電影？
questions.explanation: Let's watch an American movie!

questions.question:
A: 我們明天晚上看什麼電影？
B: 我想學中文，我們______________________吧。
questions.explanation: I want to learn Chinese, let's go watch a Taiwanese movie.

questions.question:
A: 我們週末要做什麼？
B: ______________________吧。
questions.explanation: Let's go play basketball.
